name: Hippogriffomon

signature_move.name: Heat Wave
signature_move.description: Spews out an extremely high-temperature wind.

description: A mythical beast Digimon which has the appearance of a chimera . It is said it will become a Griffomon if it evolves, but the details are not clear. Its intelligence is not as high as Griffomon's, and since its being is closer to that of a beast, its personality is also ferocious. Its Special Move is spewing out an extremely high-temperature wind ( Heat Wave ).
